title: Suki Gifts International, Caspian Mummy and Baby Turtle with Squeaker, Minty Green Plush Toy, Mummy 24cm, Baby 9cm,14473
features: Suki Gifts, Caspian Mummy and Baby Turtle with Squeaker, Minty Green Plush Toy, Mummy 24cm, Baby 9cm,14473
Soft boa mint green turtle with light brown shell
Gorgeous cuddly turtle with detachable baby turtle with squeaker
description: Product Description Suki's Caspian Mummy and Baby Turtle is so adorable. Both Mummy and Baby are made from irresistible soft boa in mint green with light brown shell. Find baby turtle inside Mummy’s shell, baby is detachable with a squeaker inside. Perfect for little hands. Available in small, medium and large as well as Backpack clip and Mummy & Baby style. Suki Gifts International are a new and innovative British Company which specialises in Gifts for everyone. Based in the UK with a friendly field sales team, all our products are designed in-house by our Product Development Team. Backed by great Customer Service and warehouse staff, we are able to deliver quality products when you need them. Safety Warning Remove all tags before giving to children
